overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character exploring a sunlit Middle Eastern courtyard with stone architecture, colorful rugs, and scattered pottery. The character walks through the space toward a columned archway exit, passing NPCs in traditional dress.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard interior with scattered rugs and floor cushions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the courtyard examining the surroundings and passing by pottery and cushions

notable_agents.action: standing near the stone bench observing the courtyard
standing near the far wall in the background

entered.detail: colorful woven rugs with intricate patterns scattered across the mosaic stone floor
piles of decorative cushions in red, purple, and gold fabrics for seating
large clay urns and bowls stacked on stone platforms against the wall
low stone seating built along the courtyard perimeter
stacked wooden storage crates and barrels

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a sunlit historic courtyard filled with colorful Persian rugs and scattered floor cushions. Clay pottery and wooden crates line the stone walls while a few NPCs stand in the background observing the space.

events.description: transitioning from open courtyard to covered walkway with stone arches

agents.ego_description: walking toward the stone archway exit while passing columns and decorative lattice work

notable_agents.action: walking away from the camera toward the archway exit

entered.detail: ornate stone arches with carved details forming the exit corridor
decorated stone pillars supporting the arched ceiling
potted greenery hanging from wall brackets
decorative wooden lattice screens on upper walls filtering sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the courtyard exit through a corridor of stone arches and columns. The rugs and pottery fall behind as hanging plants and lattice windows become visible along the walls, with an NPC walking ahead toward the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant historic courtyard that gradually narrows into a structured stone corridor. It begins by tracking the character across a sunlit open space filled with colorful Persian rugs, floor cushions, and clay pottery lining the stone walls. As the character advances, the open courtyard recedes, and the environment shifts toward a more enclosed passage defined by a series of stone arches and columns. The scene then transitions from the scattered crates and rugs of the plaza to a corridor adorned with hanging plants and lattice windows, following an NPC who walks ahead toward the exit.
